title: Crumbly Brazilian Rice Noodles Crockpot Crumble
description: A fresh and kid-friendly low-carb-friendly dish featuring air-fried flat rice noodles with a touch of tanginess from jicama.
instructions: Soak rice noodles in cold water for about 10 minutes.
Drain and rinse the noodles, then pat dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, mix the drained noodles, jicama, tomato sauce, olive oil, and salt. Toss well to combine.
Spread the mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes or until edges are golden brown and top is crispy.
Let it cool before crumbing into small pieces.
